name: Expansion Missions
description: Adds a dynamic mission system with configurable objectives, rewards, and events.
overview: Expansion Missions provides a flexible mission framework that creates dynamic objectives for players. Missions can range from simple supply drops to complex multi-stage events involving AI combat. Server owners can configure mission types, frequency, rewards, and difficulty. The system supports custom mission creation for advanced users.
installation: Add to your -mod= parameter after Core.
Start server to generate mission configuration files.
Configure mission types and parameters in the settings.

troubleshooting.solution: Verify Enabled is set to 1 and that MissionInterval hasn't been set too high.
Check reward configuration files for valid item classnames.

useCases.title: Airdrop Events
useCases.description: Configure supply drop missions that notify all players and create high-risk PvP hotspots.

useCases.title: Timed Objectives
useCases.description: Set up missions that must be completed within a time limit for bonus rewards.

quickSettings.name: Enabled
quickSettings.description: Enable or disable the mission system.

quickSettings.name: MissionInterval
quickSettings.description: Time in seconds between mission spawns.

quickSettings.name: MissionCleanupTime
quickSettings.description: Seconds before completed/failed missions are cleaned up.

quickSettings.name: EnableMissionNotifications
quickSettings.description: Show notifications when missions start or complete.
